title: Goldenside of You
lyrics: I got to find a way to get high, I got to find a way to get lady, lady, man, what you got. That makes you feel a little bit easier, ay, ay, you gotta go far, ay, you gotta climb high, you gotta climb high. As long as experimental moments don't get in the way of enjoyment in your life, ha, enjoyment all the night you're done by the way. Don't make me be the one to misbehave, life just goes a little bit fast, and you come back and up for more, you just got one last breath. Do the best of your mood, do the best for the people around you, don't strut, don't hide it from the people that you love. Have a mindset, you build up the wall of love, build up that wall of love, ay, not a hasty animosity, one that's locking in your brain, put the shit aside, don't go through the green. Flow, we'll flow, oh, we'll grow, we'll grow, oh, ay, this is not a level that we're coming up, now you see that you're growing and you're coming, more than the up is to a down, but then maybe turn around and here we go again, I said, I know, it gets hard to find the gold inside of you, what you do and who you please, and I know, it's hard to find the gold inside of you, baby, but it's this, and it don't blow me crazy, it's changing, your predicament of all the changing, don't let it mark you out, don't let it come out, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, oh, baby, yeah, find the gold inside of you, the shine, the sparkles inside your nine, nine, nine, you've gone a little off, bitch, you're getting on with me, ay, the rules, come and sing with me, say fuck love, fuck hate and fuck the moment, be that one that shows everyone you're all about it, you know it, it's your turn, flawless, show it. Mmm.
